name: Thruster_Mech

infobox.Systems: Reverse Thrusters(Brute)EffectSmoke and deal damage to a tile while dashing away. (Damage increases the further the Mech dashes away. Starts with 2-tile range.)(1 self, 1-2 damage)Upgrade I+1 Range ()Increases the max distance and damage by 1.Upgrade II+1 Range ()Increases the max distance and damage by 1.
infobox.Special: Flying: Flying units can move over any terrain tile.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theMist Eaterssquad.
sections.Strategy:
The Thruster Mech is the main damage dealer of the Mist Eaters; while it isn't the most impactful mech in its home squad, it can provide value by cancelling one attack each turn and dealing up to 2 damage right from the early-game.
Dealing high damage with the Reverse Thrusters requires theRange & Damageupgrades, along with moving long distances. This can sometimes result in the Thruster Mech being farther away from enemies for the next turn. While its innate flight gives it good mobility, having 5 or even 6+ move can still be helpful. The weapon also requires an unoccupied tile to finish its movement on, so any with enemies or obstacles can restrict where it finishes its attack (and thus, its damage). That said, with the Thruster Mech's flight, it can thrust overmountains,grid buildings, and enemy units freely; it just needs a viable tile to move to.
In the Mist Eaters,Nanofilter Mendingrepairs upon entering smoke, so the self-damage isn't as crippling of a drawback as with other self-damage mechs such as theCharge Mech. Try to move the Thruster Mech into smoke whenever below full health. Like with theViscera Nanobotspassive, if the mech loses its last health point while thrusting into smoke, it will then heal and revive. Note that if this happens over aChasm Tile, the mech will fall in before revival. If need be, the Thruster Mech can even be revived by applying smoke to it on a later turn.
While functional at 3 health due to the smoke healing, the Thruster Mech still appreciates an additional Health upgrade, or a way to mitigate the self damage. This is particularly important if using the Thruster Mech in aCustom Squadwithout a way to repair it. Good pilots for mitigating the self damage areAbe Isamu,Mafan,Ariadne, or any pilot with the +Health, Skilled, or Technician pilot abilities. Alternatively, the Thruster Mech can also be paired with theHook Mechin a Custom Squad, and have them swap their weapons right at the start of the timeline; since the Hook Mech has natural armor, it won't take self-damage from Reverse Thrusters, and the Thruster Mechs high movement with flight can be used for better positioning withGrappling Hook.
sections.Trivia: - The Thruster Mech bears a vague resemblance to theThunderbird 1from the sci-fi TV series,Thunderbirds.
